title: Where to buy Panini FIFA 2026 in Buenos Aires
checkedNote: Checked Jul 9, 2026 via BrightData search/scrape, Google Places API, ZonaKids/WOWCO/Cromy/Golmarymar/Figu Shop/Loony Toys product pages, PedidosYa Market + Mercado Libre Tienda Oficial listings, Activa Distribuidora, Figus del Mundial, Carrefour announcements, and Argentine press (A24, Infobae, La Nación, Perfil).
scamWarning: New Rita / Panini warn they do not sell or offer pickup at Cuyo 2414, Martínez (office only). Pay only via Mercado Pago on zonakids.com. Avoid CBU/alias transfers to strangers and lookalike domains (e.g. tiendapaniniargentina.com is not the official Panini store — use zonakids.com / Tienda Oficial on Mercado Libre). Prefer Tienda Oficial sellers on Mercado Libre.

sellers.name: WOWCO — caja ×1000
sellers.priceNote: Wholesale box of 1,000 packs — inquire for price
sellers.products: Caja de Figuritas Copa Mundial FIFA 2026 Panini ×1000
sellers.description: AMBA-focused Panini wholesaler listing a sealed FIFA 2026 box of 1,000 packs. Aimed at kiosks/commerce but also takes particular orders. Strong bulk option when ZonaKids sticker boxes are sold out.

sellers.name: Activa Distribuidora
sellers.fullAddress: 25 de Mayo 2387, Santa Fe, Santa Fe
sellers.products: Single packs + caja with 1,000 stickers; album also listed
sellers.description: Wholesale kiosk distributor with Panini FIFA 2026 sticker SKUs and volume pricing from 1,000 packs. Not in CABA — Santa Fe capital — but a clear verified bulk sticker channel. Ships; WhatsApp +54 9 342 485-0522.

sellers.name: Figu Shop
sellers.hours: Online · same-day AMBA if ordered before 14:00
sellers.products: FIFA 2026 packs ×25/×50/×100; soft/hard album combos; Adrenalyn XL
sellers.description: BrightData-verified Tienda Nube distributor with official Panini FIFA 2026 SKUs. Jul 9: pack ×25 at ARS 54,999 (last units messaging); ×50/×100 marked sin stock. IG/TikTok mention retiro in Floresta, CABA — no public street pin; confirm pickup on WhatsApp 11 5124-4613. Envío gratis a sucursal over ARS 130,000.

sellers.name: Mercado Libre — Tienda Oficial Panini
sellers.priceNote: Compare vs zonakids MSRP · watch shipping
sellers.products: Albums, pack kits, Adrenalyn; filter Tienda Oficial
sellers.description: BrightData scrape of Tienda Oficial Panini on Mercado Libre shows active FIFA 2026 albums and pack kits. Prefer the official store badge over third-party resellers. Good for bulk kits when ZonaKids sticker boxes are OOS; prices and stock change fast.

sellers.name: Golmarymar Caballito
sellers.products: Panini / New Rita line; homepage features Figuritas Oficiales World Cup 2026
sellers.description: Distribuidora Mar y Mar (Golmarymar) Caballito — Google Places OPERATIONAL, ★4.6 (77). Candy/kiosk wholesaler carrying Panini; site currently highlights official World Cup 2026 stickers. Good CABA bulk pickup for multi-pack buys. Tel 011 4924-7638.

sellers.name: Golmarymar Mataderos
sellers.fullAddress: Av. Juan Bautista Alberdi 5918, C1440 CABA
sellers.products: Panini line via Golmarymar
sellers.description: Second Golmarymar branch (Places ★4.5, 103 reviews). Same wholesaler promoting FIFA 2026 stickers. Tel 011 4686-3198. Confirm stock before a Mataderos trip.

sellers.name: Megafigus
sellers.products: Sticker wholesale (Panini-focused shop)
sellers.description: Google Places: “Distribuidora Mayorista de Figuritas”, OPERATIONAL, ★3.3 (165). Dedicated figuritas wholesaler in CABA — ask specifically for FIFA 2026 sealed boxes/packs before visiting.

sellers.name: Cromy Club
sellers.fullAddress: Ciudad de la Paz 2532, C1428 CABA
sellers.priceNote: Album ARS 12,000 · Pack ×25 ARS 50,000 (both OOS online)
sellers.products: Álbum FIFA 2026 + Pack sobres ×25
sellers.description: Belgrano wholesaler (Places ★3.5, 159). Site lists official Panini FIFA 2026 album and 25-pack, both “Sin stock” as of this check. Worth monitoring for restocks; phone 011 3086-1021.

sellers.name: ZonaKids — sticker boxes & combos
sellers.address: Official Panini Argentina store (New Rita S.A.)
sellers.fullAddress: Online only · New Rita S.A., Cuyo 2414, Martínez (no public pickup)
sellers.products: Sealed FIFA 2026 sticker boxes and album+pack combos
sellers.description: Only official online channel for sealed Panini sticker bulk. As of Jul 9, Box ×50, Pack ×50, and album+pack combos show “Avisame” / sold out. Soft and hard albums remain in stock. Set stock alerts.

sellers.name: ZonaKids — Adrenalyn XL display ×24
sellers.products: Adrenalyn XL trading-card display (not stickers)
sellers.description: Confirmed in stock on ZonaKids. Panini FIFA 2026 card line (Adrenalyn XL), not sticker album packs. Best official sealed bulk buy available when sticker boxes are OOS.

sellers.name: Carrefour Hipermercado Salguero
sellers.products: Soft album + sealed packs (Hiper/Market/Maxi; Express often packs only)
sellers.description: Carrefour officially stocks the collection chain-wide. This Palermo hiper (Places ★4.2, 8,086) is a strong CABA stop for buying many packs at MSRP. Press notes supers restock more reliably than kiosks. Call ahead: 0800-444-8484.

sellers.name: Jumbo Palermo Bullrich
sellers.products: Packs and sometimes albums (Cencosud)
sellers.description: Large Jumbo (Places ★4.2, 21,687). Part of the supermarket channel A24/Infobae flag for steadier sticker supply vs barrio kiosks. Good for stacking packs in one visit.

sellers.name: Coto Hipermercado Santa Fe
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: Major Coto hiper (Places ★4.1, 15,631). Repeatedly named with Jumbo/Carrefour/Disco/Vea as better-stocked than kiosks for sealed packs.

sellers.name: Disco Av. Santa Fe
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: 24h Disco (Places ★3.7, 2,250). Useful late-night restock hunt on the Santa Fe corridor with Coto/Jumbo nearby.

sellers.name: Vea Larrea
sellers.products: Packs and albums when available
sellers.description: Vea (Cencosud) named alongside Disco/Jumbo in press for better supermarket supply. Central Recoleta pin (Places ★3.8, 2,266).

sellers.name: PedidosYa Market Villa Crespo
sellers.fullAddress: Av. Juan Bautista Justo 2261, C1414 CABA
sellers.hours: Delivery via PedidosYa app · hours vary
sellers.products: Figuritas Panini Copa Mundial FIFA 2026; albums when listed
sellers.description: BrightData/Google hits confirm PedidosYa Market menus listing FIFA 2026 packs at ~ARS 2,000. Villa Crespo dark-store pin on Places (★3.2). Handy for a few packs via delivery; users report per-order caps (e.g. ~3 packs). Check the app for your zone — not a bulk channel.

sellers.name: El Mundo del Juguete Florida
sellers.products: Toys/collectibles; press lists large toy chains as Panini points of sale
sellers.description: Major CABA toy retailer (Places ★4.4, 877). Perfil and launch coverage include jugueterías alongside supers/kiosks. Ask for FIFA 2026 packs/albums — stock not guaranteed.

sellers.name: Loony Toys
sellers.products: Pack ×25 FIFA 2026; álbum tapa dura; Adrenalyn (TikTok)
sellers.description: CABA juguetería (Places ★4.3, 63) with Panini FIFA 2026 pack ×25 and hard album on loonytoys.com.ar. Jul 9 BrightData scrape: pack page shows Sin stock at ARS 63,900; album still listed. Worth a call/WhatsApp +54 9 11 3511-0305 before visiting. Pickup at Constitución 2518.

sellers.name: Kiosco Rafa
sellers.products: Figuritas & álbumes Panini (shop name)
sellers.description: Top Google hit for “figuritas Panini Mundial 2026 Buenos Aires” — Places name includes “Figuritas - Albumes Panini Argentina”, ★4 (194). Dedicated sticker kiosk on Corrientes. Tel 011 4867-1270.

sellers.name: Kiosco Chocomarket Figuritas
sellers.fullAddress: Combate de los Pozos 185, C1079 CABA
sellers.products: Figuritas-focused kiosk
sellers.description: Places listing “Kiosco chocomarket figuritas” (★4.8, 30). Another CABA specialist stop when supers are empty. Tel 011 2237-8252.

sellers.name: ZonaKids — albums only
sellers.priceNote: Soft ARS 12,000 · Hard ARS 25,000 · Gold ARS 30,000 (Gold often OOS)
sellers.products: Softcover, hardcover; Gold edition often sold out
sellers.description: Confirmed Jul 9: softcover and tapa dura albums add-to-cart. Gold and sticker combos mostly sold out. Buy the album here at official price while hunting packs elsewhere.

sellers.name: Figus del Mundial
sellers.products: Individual Panini FIFA 2026 stickers; pickup or Vía Cargo
sellers.description: CABA pickup for missing stickers, not sealed bulk boxes. Order online, then collect at Olleros 4198. Useful once you have packs and need specific numbers.

sellers.name: Figuritas.ar — El Club de las Figus
sellers.fullAddress: Lambaré 861, C1185 Almagro, CABA · weekend exchange Av. Patricias Argentinas 441-455
sellers.hours: Shop: check IG · Weekend exchange Sat–Sun ~9:00–19:00 at Parque Centenario
sellers.products: Intercambio and loose FIFA 2026 stickers
sellers.description: Instagram/Facebook list sealed packs + albums at Lambaré 861, Almagro (geocoded). Places also lists weekend intercambio at Parque Centenario (★4.6). Useful for loose trades and local pickup — not a sealed ×1000 wholesaler. Tel 011 2532-6408.

sellers.name: Neighborhood kiosks & newsstands
sellers.fullAddress: CABA and AMBA · stock and price vary by corner
sellers.priceNote: MSRP ARS 2,000 · CABA reports up to ARS 3,500+
sellers.products: Single packs; albums often missing
sellers.description: Traditional channel, but UKRA/Infobae report thin deliveries and overpricing while supers get priority. Fine for a few packs at ARS 2,000; skip markups. Prefer supers or wholesalers for volume.
